source_of_truth: Single JSON consumed by all installed resume skills (paramchoudhary/resumeskills) and the local resume-builder dispatcher.

identity.name: Sourabh Bhaumik
identity.headline: Founder & CEO | IT Services, Field Operations & AI Transformation
headline_alternates: Founder & CEO | IT Services & FinTech Operations Leader | AI Transformation Generalist
Serial Entrepreneur | Business Strategist | Technology & Operations Leader
Entrepreneur | AI Generalist | System Integration & Field Operations Specialist

summary.short: Kolkata-based founder and serial entrepreneur with experience scaling IT services, field operations, and digital transformation businesses across India.
summary.long: Kolkata-based founder and serial entrepreneur with experience across IT services, system integration, field operations, data centre operations, POS deployment, e-governance, cab aggregation, creative industries, and social impact initiatives. Co-founder and CEO of Ultimate Digital Solutions (UDS), a multi-domain IT and operations company that crossed the ₹10 crore turnover milestone. Currently leading AI transformation initiatives for traditional service operations. B.Tech in Computer Science; SAP ABAP certified.

career_objective: To build, lead, and scale technology-driven businesses that solve real operational problems for enterprises, institutions, and consumers, while combining IT services, AI transformation, field execution, automation, and human-centric service delivery.

current_roles.title: Co-founder & CEO / Managing Director
current_roles.industry: IT services, system integration, field operations, POS, data centre O&M, e-governance, digital transformation
highlights: Built and scaled UDS into a multi-service company across IT support, system integration, data centre O&M, POS deployment, field manpower, e-governance, electrical, and digital transformation.
Achieved the ₹10 crore (₹100 million) turnover milestone in the early growth phase.

Led pan-India service delivery across multiple Indian states, managing field teams, vendors, and large-scale deployment projects including government-linked digitization work involving thousands of resources.

Developed product concepts: FieldConnect (field engineer tracking, call assignment, stock movement, attendance, MIS) and PosBuddy (POS device stock, install/service calls, engineer allocation, merchant support, service reporting).
Owned enterprise client relationships, proposal development, sales, and strategic partnerships.
Leading AI transformation planning for internal operations and traditional service businesses.

current_roles.title: Director
highlights: Film, media, and creative production reflecting involvement in theatre, storytelling, performance, and visual creativity.

current_roles.title: Chairman
highlights: Social impact NGO focused on environmental awareness, peace, sustainability, and community-oriented initiatives.

current_roles.title: Co-founder & Director
highlights: Human-assisted outstation cab service with phone/WhatsApp-based booking for families, patients, senior citizens, and non-app users. Pan-India travel service vision; vendor and driver onboarding; booking, invoicing, and service coordination.

achievements: Co-founded and scaled Ultimate Digital Solutions Pvt. Ltd.
Achieved ₹10 crore / ₹100 million turnover milestone within the early growth phase of UDS.
Led or contributed to large-scale deployment-oriented projects involving field manpower and digital operations.
Associated with projects involving thousands of resources in government-linked digitization work.
Built operational presence and service capability across multiple Indian states.
Developed product concepts such as FieldConnect and PosBuddy for field operations and POS service management.
Launched or participated in three startups and one NGO initiative.
Received Top 50 Emerging Startup in India Award.
MSME business recognition from Bengal Chamber of Commerce & Industry.
UDS: SME, emerging-IT, and entrepreneurship-related recognitions.
84% in SAP ABAP certification test in 2008, one of the highest scores in India at that time.
Completed Annapurna Base Camp summit in October 2023.

personal_brand_statement: I am a founder and business builder focused on solving practical operational problems through technology, people, process, and execution. My journey spans IT services, field operations, POS deployment, data centre support, cab services, creative production, and social impact. I believe in building businesses that are scalable, trusted, human-centric, and ready for the AI-driven future.
